title: Performance & Architecture Refactoring
description: Address critical performance and architectural issues identified in the Comprehensive Codebase Review

sprints.title: Eliminate Deep Copying (Critical Performance)
sprints.focus: Remove O(n) deep copying on every read operation

sprints.title: Fix Write Amplification
sprints.focus: Implement append-only writes instead of full file rewrites

sprints.title: Add Indexes for Search Performance
sprints.focus: Add NameIndex, TypeIndex, LowercaseCache for O(1) lookups

sprints.title: Simplify Server Layer
sprints.focus: Organize handlers, reduce tool definition verbosity

sprints.title: Fix Error Handling Inconsistencies
sprints.focus: Standardize throw vs return null, add error context

sprints.title: Optimize TF-IDF Index
sprints.focus: Lazy loading, incremental updates, memory optimization

sprints.title: Reduce Code Duplication
sprints.focus: Extract filter chain, pagination, date utilities

sprints.title: Documentation and Testing Updates
sprints.focus: Update CLAUDE.md, add ADRs, reorganize tests

sprints.title: Final Cleanup and Verification
sprints.focus: Run all tests, benchmarks, prepare release

sprints.title: Further Manager Consolidation (Remaining Critique)
sprints.focus: Reduce from 9 managers to 4 as originally planned - merge remaining managers
sprints.critiqueSource: Analysis Report: 'Still 9 managers - Could consolidate further'

sprints.title: Reduce Abstraction Layers (Remaining Critique)
sprints.focus: Simplify 6-layer call stack to 3 layers for common operations
sprints.critiqueSource: Analysis Report: 'Abstraction layers - Still 6 layers for operations'

sprints.title: SQLite Migration Preparation (Remaining Critique)
sprints.focus: Create storage abstraction layer and SQLite adapter for future migration path

sprints.title: Code Volume Reduction (Remaining Critique)
sprints.focus: Reduce code from 11,131 lines to target ~6,000 lines through consolidation
sprints.critiqueSource: Analysis Report: 'Code volume - Slightly larger (+459 lines)'
sprints.note: Reduced from 4 tasks - Sprint 11 & 12 already delete manager files and KGM

dependencyGraph.mermaid:
graph TD
    S1[Sprint 1: Deep Copy] --> S2[Sprint 2: Write Amplification]
    S1 --> S3[Sprint 3: Indexes]
    S2 --> S4[Sprint 4: Manager Consolidation]
    S3 --> S4
    S4 --> S5[Sprint 5: Server Layer]
    S4 --> S6[Sprint 6: Error Handling]
    S3 --> S7[Sprint 7: TF-IDF]
    S5 --> S8[Sprint 8: Code Duplication]
    S6 --> S8
    S7 --> S8
    S8 --> S9[Sprint 9: Documentation]
    S9 --> S10[Sprint 10: Final Cleanup]
    S10 --> S11[Sprint 11: Further Manager Consolidation]
    S11 --> S12[Sprint 12: Reduce Abstraction Layers]
    S11 --> S13[Sprint 13: SQLite Migration Prep]
    S12 --> S14[Sprint 14: Code Volume Reduction]
    S13 --> S14

parallelExecutionGroups.description: Can run in parallel after Sprint 1
Can run in parallel after Sprint 4 (5,6) or Sprint 3 (7)
Can run in parallel after Sprint 11

riskAssessment.mitigation: Run full test suite after each sprint

notes: Sprint 1 is the critical path - it must be completed first as both Sprint 2 and Sprint 3 depend on it. Sprints 2 and 3 can run in parallel. After those complete, Sprint 4 can begin. This ordering minimizes total execution time while respecting dependencies.

remainingCritique.description: Issues from Comprehensive_Codebase_Review.md that remain after Sprints 1-10

items.issue: Abstraction layers - Still 6 layers for operations
